reason: Global TianChen-RV stage order and RVV-first authority chain for bounded Stage2 RVV work.
RVV plugin-owned typed body, selected-body realization, route provider, fail-closed, and ssh evidence rules.
Common EmitC route boundary and prohibition on common/export RVV semantic inference.
lit/FileCheck and runtime evidence expectations for compiler behavior changes.

summary: Added typed tcrv_rvv.masked_load as the bounded contiguous data masked-load surface, with verifier checks for mask producer, passthrough/result type, memory_form, inactive-lane policy, runtime/VL scope, and source role.

Rewired selected-body realization so masked_unit_load_store and computed_masked_unit_load_store materialize mask producer, old-destination passthrough load, tcrv_rvv.masked_load, and unit store instead of unmasked source load plus masked_move; kept computed strided store on masked_move intentionally out of scope.

Updated RVV route planning/provider to derive route support, RouteOperandBindingPlan operands, masked-load intrinsic/header mirror, materialized source/mask/passthrough/store uses, and fail-closed diagnostics from typed body facts.
Updated construction protocol route roles and executable role sequences for masked_load as load role authority; repaired masked_unit_store canonical role order regression exposed by full check.
Extended generated-bundle evidence tooling and tests for explicit/pre-realized masked_unit_load_store and pre-realized computed_masked_unit_load_store; added computed-mask unit dry-run lit coverage.
